mapper.select: select db, owner, table_name, column_name, column_id, pk_yn, pk_position, full_data_type, data_type, data_length, nullable, comments, DATE_FORMAT(regdate,'%Y/%m/%d') as regdate, DATE_FORMAT(upddate,'%Y/%m/%d') as upddate, reguserid, upduserid from cotdl.tbl_piitable order by db, owner, table_name, column_id
mapper.update: update cotdl.tbl_piitable set column_id= #{column_id, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, pk_yn= #{pk_yn, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, pk_position= #{pk_position, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, full_data_type= #{full_data_type, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, data_type= #{data_type, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, data_length= #{data_length, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, nullable= #{nullable, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, comments= #{comments, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, regdate= str_to_date(#{regdate, jdbcType=VARCHAR},'%Y/%m/%d'), upddate= NOW(), reguserid= #{reguserid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, upduserid= #{upduserid, jdbcType=VARCHAR} where db= #{db, jdbcType=VARCHAR} and owner= #{owner, jdbcType=VARCHAR} and table_name= #{table_name, jdbcType=VARCHAR} and column_name= #{column_name, jdbcType=VARCHAR}

trim.if: and (s.owner LIKE concat('PII%', #{search5}) OR s.owner LIKE concat('%', #{search5}, '%PII'))

mapper.select: select count(1) from cotdl.tbl_piitable s where 1=1

select s.db, s.owner, s.table_name, s.column_id, s.column_name, s.data_type , s.data_length from cotdl.tbl_piitable s left outer join cotdl.tbl_piitable a on a.db='DLMARC' and a.owner = #{archiveOwner} and (a.owner LIKE concat('PII%', s.owner) OR a.owner LIKE concat('%', s.owner, '%PII')) and a.table_name=s.table_name and a.column_id=s.column_id+5 and a.column_name=s.column_name left outer join (select db, owner, table_name from cotdl.tbl_piitable group by db, owner, table_name) b on b.db='DLMARC' and b.owner = #{archiveOwner} and (b.owner LIKE concat('PII%', s.owner) OR b.owner LIKE concat('%', s.owner, '%PII')) and b.table_name=s.table_name where 1=1 and a.column_name is null and b.table_name is not null
order by s.db, s.owner, s.table_name, s.column_id

select count(1) from cotdl.tbl_piitable s left outer join cotdl.tbl_piitable a on a.db='DLMARC' and a.owner = #{archiveOwner} and (a.owner LIKE concat('PII%', s.owner) OR a.owner LIKE concat('%', s.owner, '%PII')) and a.table_name=s.table_name and a.column_id=s.column_id+5 and a.column_name=s.column_name where 1=1 and a.column_name is null

select db, owner, table_name, column_name, column_id, pk_yn, pk_position, full_data_type, data_type, data_length, nullable, comments, DATE_FORMAT(regdate,'%Y/%m/%d') as regdate, DATE_FORMAT(upddate,'%Y/%m/%d') as upddate, reguserid, upduserid from cotdl.tbl_piitable
order by db, owner, table_name, column_id limit #{offset}, #{amount}

select db, owner, table_name, column_name, column_id, pk_yn, pk_position, full_data_type, data_type, data_length, nullable, comments, regdate, upddate, reguserid, upduserid , domain, piitype, piigrade, encript_flag, scramble_type from ( select t.db, t.owner, t.table_name, t.column_name, t.column_id, t.pk_yn, t.pk_position, t.full_data_type, t.data_type, t.data_length, t.nullable, coalesce(t.comments, m.column_comment) as comments, DATE_FORMAT(t.regdate,'%Y/%m/%d') as regdate, DATE_FORMAT(t.upddate,'%Y/%m/%d') as upddate, t.reguserid, t.upduserid , m.domain, m.piitype, m.piigrade, m.encript_flag, m.scramble_type from cotdl.tbl_piitable t left outer join cotdl.tbl_metatable m on t.db = m.db and t.owner = m.owner and t.table_name = m.table_name and t.column_name = m.column_name order by t.db, t.owner, t.table_name, t.column_id ) as b
order by db, owner, table_name, column_id

select count(1) from ( select db, owner, table_name from cotdl.tbl_piitable
group by db, owner, table_name ) c
select distinct db, owner from cotdl.tbl_piisteptable where exetype = 'ARCHIVE'

select a.owner as owner_src, a.table_name as table_name_src, a.column_id as column_id_src, a.column_name as column_name_src, a.data_length as data_length_src, #{archiveOwner} as owner_arc, a.table_name as table_name_arc, NOW() as gapdate, case when err.parallelcnt like 'ARC_DDL_ERROR:%' then substring_index(substring(err.parallelcnt, length('ARC_DDL_ERROR:') + 1), '|DDL:', 1) else null end as error_reason from cotdl.tbl_piitable a join cotdl.tbl_piisteptable s on s.db = a.db and s.owner = a.owner and s.table_name = a.table_name and s.exetype = 'ARCHIVE' left join cotdl.tbl_piitable b on b.owner = #{archiveOwner} and b.table_name = a.table_name and b.column_name = a.column_name left join ( select db, owner, table_name, max(parallelcnt) as parallelcnt from cotdl.tbl_piisteptable where exetype = 'ARCHIVE' and parallelcnt like 'ARC_DDL_ERROR:%' group by db, owner, table_name ) err on err.db = a.db and err.owner = a.owner and err.table_name = a.table_name where a.db = #{db} and a.owner = #{srcOwner} and b.column_name is null and a.column_name not in ('PII_ORDER_ID','PII_BASE_DATE','PII_CUST_ID','PII_JOB_ID','PII_DESTRUCT_DATE') order by a.table_name, a.column_id

select db, owner, table_name , sum( (case when DATA_TYPE = 'NUMBER' then 22 when DATA_TYPE = 'CHAR' then DATA_LENGTH * 3 when DATA_TYPE LIKE 'VARCHAR%' then DATA_LENGTH * 3 when DATA_TYPE = 'FLOAT' then 22 when DATA_TYPE = 'DATE' then 10 when DATA_TYPE LIKE 'TIMESTAMP%' then 10 when DATA_TYPE in ('LONGBLOB','BLOB') then 25 when DATA_TYPE in ('CLOB','NCLOB','LONG','NVARCHAR2') then 25 else 50 END ) -- 65,535 max ) as all_row_size , sum( (case when DATA_TYPE = 'NUMBER' then 22 when DATA_TYPE = 'CHAR' then DATA_LENGTH * 3 when DATA_TYPE LIKE 'VARCHAR%' and DATA_LENGTH < 1000 then DATA_LENGTH * 3 when DATA_TYPE = 'FLOAT' then 22 when DATA_TYPE = 'DATE' then 10 when DATA_TYPE LIKE 'TIMESTAMP%' then 10 when DATA_TYPE in ('LONGBLOB','BLOB') then 25 when DATA_TYPE in ('CLOB','NCLOB','LONG','NVARCHAR2') then 25 else 50 END ) -- 65,535 max ) as all_row_size_1000 , sum( (case when DATA_TYPE = 'NUMBER' then 22 when DATA_TYPE = 'CHAR' then DATA_LENGTH * 3 when DATA_TYPE LIKE 'VARCHAR%' and DATA_LENGTH < 500 then DATA_LENGTH * 3 when DATA_TYPE = 'FLOAT' then 22 when DATA_TYPE = 'DATE' then 10 when DATA_TYPE LIKE 'TIMESTAMP%' then 10 when DATA_TYPE in ('LONGBLOB','BLOB') then 25 when DATA_TYPE in ('CLOB','NCLOB','LONG','NVARCHAR2') then 25 else 50 END ) -- 65,535 max ) as all_row_size_500 , sum( (case when DATA_TYPE = 'NUMBER' then 22 when DATA_TYPE = 'CHAR' then DATA_LENGTH * 3 when DATA_TYPE LIKE 'VARCHAR%' and DATA_LENGTH < 86 then DATA_LENGTH * 3 when DATA_TYPE = 'FLOAT' then 22 when DATA_TYPE = 'DATE' then 10 when DATA_TYPE LIKE 'TIMESTAMP%' then 10 when DATA_TYPE in ('LONGBLOB','BLOB') then 25 when DATA_TYPE in ('CLOB','NCLOB','LONG','NVARCHAR2') then 25 else 50 END ) -- 8,126 max ) as page_row_size , sum( (case when DATA_TYPE = 'NUMBER' then 22 when DATA_TYPE = 'CHAR' then DATA_LENGTH * 3 when DATA_TYPE LIKE 'VARCHAR%' and DATA_LENGTH < 40 then DATA_LENGTH * 3 when DATA_TYPE = 'FLOAT' then 22 when DATA_TYPE = 'DATE' then 10 when DATA_TYPE LIKE 'TIMESTAMP%' then 10 when DATA_TYPE in ('LONGBLOB','BLOB') then 25 when DATA_TYPE in ('CLOB','NCLOB','LONG','NVARCHAR2') then 25 else 50 END ) -- 8,126 max ) as page_row_size_40 , sum( (case when DATA_TYPE = 'NUMBER' then 22 when DATA_TYPE = 'CHAR' then DATA_LENGTH * 3 when DATA_TYPE LIKE 'VARCHAR%' and DATA_LENGTH < 20 then DATA_LENGTH * 3 when DATA_TYPE = 'FLOAT' then 22 when DATA_TYPE = 'DATE' then 10 when DATA_TYPE LIKE 'TIMESTAMP%' then 10 when DATA_TYPE in ('LONGBLOB','BLOB') then 25 when DATA_TYPE in ('CLOB','NCLOB','LONG','NVARCHAR2') then 25 else 50 END ) -- 8,126 max ) as page_row_size_20 from cotdl.tbl_piitable s where 1=1
group by db, owner, table_name
